title: Low-Cost Robotic Arm
description: A robotic arm built to make robotics more accessible for learning and hands-on projects.
takeaways: Learned computer vision, robotics integration, and machine learning optimization

title: ActuAid
description: An assistive device to rehabilitate athletes using adaptive resistance training.
takeaways: Learned computer vision, robotics integration, and machine learning optimization

title: PID Controlled Car
description: PID-controlled car with  Raspberry Pi web interface and multi-car network communication.
takeaways: Mastered React, and modern web development practices

title: Data Visualization Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard for analyzing complex datasets with real-time updates
takeaways: Advanced data visualization and real-time processing techniques
